Table	Create Table
roe_documents	CREATE TABLE `roe_documents` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `engagement_id` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `title` varchar(512) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `version` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.0',
  `status` enum('draft','pending_review','approved','active','completed','archived') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `organization_name` varchar(512) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `organization_address` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `testing_firm_name` varchar(512) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `testing_firm_address` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `purpose` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `scope_description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `assumptions` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `limitations` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `risks` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `test_schedule_start` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `test_schedule_end` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `testing_window_start` varchar(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `testing_window_end` varchar(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `testing_days` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `test_timezone` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `test_site_locations` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `remote_testing_allowed` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '1',
  `vpn_required` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `badge_escort_required` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `test_equipment` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `communication_frequency` enum('daily','weekly','bi-weekly','as-needed') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'daily',
  `communication_method` enum('email','phone','secure_portal','encrypted_email') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'secure_portal',
  `status_report_frequency` enum('daily','weekly','milestone-based') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'daily',
  `incident_definition` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `incident_response_procedure` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `emergency_halt_criteria` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `resumption_procedure` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `in_scope_assets` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `out_of_scope_assets` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `in_scope_ip_ranges` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `out_of_scope_ip_ranges` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `in_scope_domains` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `out_of_scope_domains` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `in_scope_applications` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `cloud_environments` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `wireless_networks` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `physical_locations` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `testing_types` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `attack_vectors` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `social_engineering_pretexts` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `dos_testing_allowed` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `physical_testing_allowed` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `wireless_testing_allowed` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `social_engineering_allowed` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `credentialed_testing` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `credential_accounts` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `file_modification_allowed` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `file_installation_allowed` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `pivoting_allowed` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '1',
  `exfiltration_allowed` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `persistence_allowed` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `shunning_policy` enum('allowed','not_allowed','notify_first') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'notify_first',
  `fedramp_compliant` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `fedramp_attack_vectors` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `fedramp_impact_level` enum('low','moderate','high','not_applicable') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'not_applicable',
  `service_model` enum('iaas','paas','saas','hybrid','not_applicable') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'not_applicable',
  `data_handling_procedure` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `evidence_retention_days` int(11) DEFAULT '90',
  `evidence_encryption_required` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '1',
  `pii_handling_policy` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `evidence_destruction_method` enum('secure_delete','physical_destruction','crypto_erase') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'secure_delete',
  `report_deliverables` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `report_frequency` enum('daily','weekly','final_only') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'final_only',
  `critical_finding_notification` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `legal_jurisdiction` varchar(256) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `third_party_agreements` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `liability_waiver` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `nda_required` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '1',
  `nda_reference` varchar(256) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `compliance_frameworks` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `approved_by` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `approved_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_modified_by` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `pdf_url` varchar(1024) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `roe_tenant_id` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=60001
